name: opt-ai-skills
description: OPT-AI academic society reporting skills for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Biweekly research/development reports with KakaoTalk reminder automation.
interface.longDescription: OPT-AI Skills provides research_weekly and develop_weekly workflows that summarize presentation materials or Git commits and append them to continuously maintained report documents in this repository.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $research_weekly or $develop_weekly to append an OPT-AI biweekly report.
